stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The ADF in the aircraft has been tuned to a nearby NDB, and has been identified. The appendix shows the accompanying RBI and the Direction Indicator in the aircraft, which has just been aligned with the on-board compass. Ignoring any applicable turn radius and wind effects, which statement is correct?

options.a: Maintaining a heading of 120° makes the aircraft fly towards QDM 240°.
options.b: Maintaining a heading of 120° makes the aircraft fly towards QDR 240°.
options.c: Turning to a heading of 210° makes the aircraft track along QDM 210°.
options.d: Turning to a heading of 030° makes the aircraft track along QDM 030°.
